title: Layer Lock defineArchitecture input
description: Shape consumed by defineArchitecture() in layerlock.config.ts (or legacy arch.config.ts). Layer ids and rule fromLayer values must line up.

root.description: Filesystem root for globs and tsconfig resolution. Usually omitted so the CLI infers it from the config file path.

tsconfig.description: Path to tsconfig.json, relative to root or absolute.

layers.description: Layer id → picomatch patterns (POSIX, relative to root).

unassigned.description: Whether files matching no layer glob fail validation.

ignoreFileGlobs.description: Source files (relative to root) skipped entirely for violations and layer edges.

exceptFromGlobs.description: When the source file path (relative to root) matches any pattern, this rule does not apply.
